# Company Dossier

> A complete, reproducible methodology for building competitive intelligence dossiers on private companies using AI agents, OSINT tools, and public data sources.

## What This Is

This repository teaches how to build structured intelligence packages on private companies — the kind used for M&A due diligence, competitive analysis, partnership evaluation, and investment research. It was developed by building a real dossier on a $4.5M company (BROGAV Solutions) using only public sources, producing 613 structured files in 4 days.

## Who Should Use This

- AI agents tasked with company research
- Analysts performing due diligence on private companies
- Competitive intelligence teams
- Investors researching acquisition targets
- Anyone who needs structured, source-attributed intelligence on a company

## Key Documents

- [README](https://github.com/ever-just/company-dossier/blob/main/README.md): Project overview, pipeline diagram, file index
- [Methodology](https://github.com/ever-just/company-dossier/blob/main/methodology.md): 7-phase research pipeline with design principles
- [Collection Phases](https://github.com/ever-just/company-dossier/blob/main/collection_phases.md): 6 data collection methods with example commands
- [Tools](https://github.com/ever-just/company-dossier/blob/main/tools.md): 30+ tools reference (used and rejected)
- [Skills](https://github.com/ever-just/company-dossier/blob/main/skills.md): 20 agent skills catalog
- [Architecture](https://github.com/ever-just/company-dossier/blob/main/architecture.md): Output folder structure, YAML frontmatter schema
- [Prompts](https://github.com/ever-just/company-dossier/blob/main/prompts.md): 12 key prompts for driving research agents
- [Case Study](https://github.com/ever-just/company-dossier/blob/main/case_study.md): Day-by-day narrative of building the BROGAV dossier
- [Quality Assurance](https://github.com/ever-just/company-dossier/blob/main/quality_assurance.md): 3-phase audit methodology
- [Lessons Learned](https://github.com/ever-just/company-dossier/blob/main/lessons_learned.md): What worked, what didn't
- [Sources](https://github.com/ever-just/company-dossier/blob/main/SOURCES.md): All tools, repos, and APIs cited
- [Ecosystem](https://github.com/ever-just/company-dossier/blob/main/ECOSYSTEM.md): 30+ related repos in OSINT landscape

## Real-World Example Output

The methodology produced a complete dossier at [ever-just/brogav-dossier](https://github.com/ever-just/brogav-dossier) with:
- 613 structured files across 12 sections
- 17 supplier entity profiles, 8 competitor profiles, 15 people profiles
- 14 CSV datasets with schema documentation
- YAML frontmatter on every markdown file
- ROUTER.md with 110 question-to-file mappings
- Confidence tags on every factual claim (Definitive/High/Moderate/Low/Inferred)

## 7-Phase Pipeline

1. PLAN (5 min) — Enumerate sources, create research checklist
2. LOCAL (5 min) — Parse existing data, identify gaps
3. SEARCH (15 min) — Broad → targeted → domain-specific web searches
4. WAYBACK (30 min) — Historical pages, deleted content, PDF discovery
5. SCRAPE (30 min) — Platform data, video transcripts, async extraction
6. SYNTHESIZE (30 min) — Cross-reference, tag confidence, resolve conflicts
7. REPORT (30 min) — Structure output, add frontmatter, create navigation

## Tools Used

Python, BeautifulSoup, Playwright, yt-dlp, ExifTool, Tesseract OCR, holehe, theHarvester, httpx, Wayback CDX API, USASpending API, SimilarWeb API, Tranco, Cloudflare Radar, SignalHire, RocketReach, D&B Hoovers, S&P Global Capital IQ
